iterations.text:
Hey mate, how is it going? It's been too long, far too long, and I have been carrying a quiet bit of guilt about the huge distance there has been between us these past few years. Life has a way of pulling you in a hundred different directions, but that is no excuse for letting a friendship like ours drift the way it has.

I am writing this from Corfu of all places, sitting on the very same beach we had one of the greatest night's drinking of our lives. I cannot quite believe I am back here. Watching the sun go down over that water this evening triggered some wonderful memories, the kind that make you laugh out loud at nothing on your own with a beer in your hand.

It has made me determined to keep in closer touch and to make a proper effort to see you soon. Let's not leave it another year, mate. Drop me a line when you can.

All the best,

mate. its been ages. like, ages ages. and i feel kinda bad about it cos honestly the silence has been on me too, not just you. life right, life just yanks you about, but thats no excuse really.

so guess where i am. corfu. corfu mate. that same beach. the one with the night, you know the night. cant believe im sat here typing this out with sand in my shorts and a warm beer cos i forgot to put it back in the cooler.

watched the sun go down earlier and god the memories just came flooding. that bar. that scooter. the woman with the dog. you remember the dog right. i actually laughed out loud on me own like a proper idiot.

anyway. point is. im not leaving it another year, im not. drop us a line yeah. anytime. miss you mate.

cheers,

oi. oi mate. how u doin. been way to long, way too long, and yeah i kno its on me as much as u, prob more honestly. the gap between us got huge somehow, like one minute ur in each others pocket the next its years and ur scrolling instagram going oh hes still alive then.

guess where i am rite now. corfu. yeah. that beach. THAT beach. the one. the night of nights. cant even type it without grinning like a muppet.

sun just went down over the water and i swear to god i nearly cried like a soft lad. that scooter mate. the dog. the bar guy with the eyebrows. lol.

so im not letting another year go. nope. text us. call us. anything. love you mate honestly.

ttyl,

mate
mate mate mate
how r u. how r u really. its been to long. to long. on me i kno. on me.

so. corfu. im in corfu rn. that beach. THAT beach. u kno the one. the night. lol. cant even.

sun went down. sat there like a div. nearly cried ngl. the scooter. the dog. that bar guy. eyebrows guy. omg.

not doin another year of silence. not happenin. txt us. ring us. owt. miss u loads bro honest.

cba writin more. just. yh. love ya.

x

mate
mate mate mate
how r u. how r u really. been way to long. way to long. on me, on me i kno.

ok so. corfu. im in corfu rn. yh that corfu. that beach. THAT beach. the one. the night. lol. cant even type it.

sat watchin sun go down earlier like a proper div. nearly welled up ngl. that scooter. omg the scooter. the dog. that bar guy. eyebrows guy. the woman shoutin in greek. lol. was just sat there with a warm peroni grinnin to meself like an idiot.

so listen. not doin another year of nowt. not happenin. txt us. ring us. send a meme. owt. just. dont go quiet again. miss u loads bro, honest to god, miss u.

cba writin more cos im gettin sand in the keyboard.

luv ya x

so listen yh. not doin another year of nowt. not happenin bro. txt us. ring us. send a meme. owt. just. dont go quiet on me again pls.

miss u loads. honest to god. miss u.

cba typin more cos sand in the keyboard.

luv ya x
